cognitive_linguistic_native_v1.description: Native-language version of the cognitive-linguistic battery. Each participant answers in their native language only.

zh.title: 探究语言与思维方式（汉语母语版）
zh.q2_assessment: ✅ Correct — 孝 has no direct DE/EN equivalent

en.title: Language and Thinking Survey (English Native)
en.q2_assessment: ⚠️ Issue — Privacy has direct equivalents (隐私, Privatsphäre). Suggest replacing with 'Serendipity' or a genuinely culture-specific EN concept

differences_from_pilot.q2: Pilot used 孝 across all languages. Native versions use language-specific concepts (孝/Fernweh/Privacy).
differences_from_pilot.q10: Pilot asked to 'describe the robot'. Native versions ask to 'name the robot'. Different cognitive task.
differences_from_pilot.format: Pilot: all languages answered in ZH. Native: each language answered in respective native language.

next_steps.fix_en_q2: Replace 'Privacy' with a concept that has no direct ZH/DE equivalent (e.g., 'Serendipity', 'Dramatic', or 'Gloom')
next_steps.register_db: Register cognitive_linguistic_native_v1 in linguaGraph.db for future DE/EN data collection
next_steps.print_de_questionnaires: DE native questionnaire is ready for distribution to German participants
